title: Underwood-Aggregator Walking Poles - 2 Pack Collapsible Hiking Poles for Women and Men, Ultralight Telescopic Backpacking Walking Stick, Adjustable Trekking Poles for Mountaining, Anti-shock System
features: BUILT TO LAST: One of the great benefits of trekking poles is that they can help distribute weight more evenly, reducing the strain on your back and shoulders. The aluminium alloy construction ensures they won't bend or break, even on the toughest trails. The poles are equipped with a shock-absorbing system that reduces the impact on your joints and muscles. If you have a lightweight trekking tent, the poles will work not only for you but also for your tent or tarp

EASY TO USE: The collapsible walking poles can be quickly and easily disassembled into a compact size for storage and transport. It has two innovative quick flip locks and a twist lock to adjust the height of the poles to fit your individual needs. You can adjust the telescopic walking stick’s length by pulling or pushing the sections to the desired length. This adjustable walking stick is easy to operate, suitable for men, women, seniors, teenagers

ADJUSTABLE DESIGN & LIGHTWEIGHT: The hiking sticks can be adjusted from 60 to 135 cm to accommodate users of varying heights and terrains of different slopes. The simple flip-lock mechanism makes it easy to adjust the height of the poles and secure them in place. It weights only 500g, helping you save weight and space in your backpack

COMFORTABLE HANDLE & WRIST STRAP: The ergonomic handles are designed to fit comfortably in your hands, providing a secure grip even when your hands are sweaty or wet. This shape provides good support for casual walking and hiking. It doesn't chafe your hand over time like hard rubber. The wrist straps also help to reduce fatigue and increase stability. Slip your hand through it from underneath, so the strap sits snugly around your wrist. This allows you to relax your grip on the poles

ACCESSORIES FOR VARIOUS TERRAINS: These trekking poles are incredibly durable and versatile, and have 4 types of tips to make them perfect for all kinds of terrain, including asphalt, snow, mud and flat roads. Includes 2 x walking sticks, 2 x rubber tips, 2 x mud baskets, 2 x boot tips, 2 x snow baskets, 1 x storage bag
